text.tspan: lunedì 13 luglio 2026 alle ore 00:51 Ora legale dell’Europa centrale

Storage Engine bounded context: domain model, reactive repository/application ports, reactive orchestration layer, filesystem/YAML adapters, and Anti-Corruption Layer adapter that implements Object Store repository interfaces using the Storage Engine backend. MINIO_STANDARD semantics are STANDARD with dedup disabled and EC enabled (4 data / 2 parity); this view does not claim verified physical EC shard placement.
the S3 API, admin API, object-store
docs do not claim verified physical
